findings.evidence: `TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/Complex.lean:115-123` has `rw [Finsupp.lsum_apply]`, `unfold Finsupp.sum`, then `change ...`; Mathlib exposes `Finsupp.lsum_apply` at `Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Finsupp/LSum.lean:120` and `LinearMap.smulRight_apply` at `Mathlib/Algebra/Module/LinearMap/End.lean:325`.
findings.fix: Rewrite the proof directly with public API lemmas, e.g. `rw [fullyBlockedDifferential, Finsupp.lsum_apply]` followed by `simp [Finsupp.sum, LinearMap.smulRight_apply]`, or add a comment explaining why this `change` is unavoidable.
findings.issue: `fullyBlockedDifferential_apply` uses an uncommented `change` after unfolding `Finsupp.sum`, relying on the exact definitional shape of `Finsupp.lsum`/`LinearMap.smulRight` to expose the goal.

summary: One arbitrary-chain proof still relies on undocumented goal-shaping through definitional equality, which makes the stated API lemma harder to maintain than necessary.
